---
title: "Bayesian_Optimisation"
author: "Elizabet Sanyal"
date: "2023-06-17"
output: html_document
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
```



```{r}





val_window <- 60
training_window <- 60

window_data <- as.matrix(data_wide[1:training_window,])
window_returns <- as.matrix(returns[1:training_window,])
    
val_window_data <- as.matrix(data_wide[training_window:(training_window+val_window),])
val_returns <- as.matrix(returns[training_window:(training_window+val_window),])


num_features <- ncol(data_wide)


build_hp_tuning_model <- function(hp) {
  
    layer <- hp$Choice('layer', c(1, 2,3,4))
    layer_1 <- layer_input(shape = c(num_features), 
                           name = "input_1")
    units_choice <- hp$Choice("units", c(3,9,12, 21,36, 90))
   
    layer_linear <-  layer_1 %>% 
                           layer_dense(units = units_choice, 
                                       activation = "linear",
                                       kernel_initializer = initializer_glorot_uniform(seed=145)
                                    ) %>% layer_lambda(row_scale)%>% layer_dropout(rate = 0.2)


  layer_2 <- layer_input(shape = c(num_features), name = "input_2")
     
     layer_nonlinear <- layer_2 %>% layer_dense(units = units_choice,
                                                activation = 'sigmoid',
                                                kernel_initializer = initializer_glorot_uniform(seed=145)
                                      )  %>% layer_lambda(row_scale) %>%  layer_dropout(rate = 0.2)
                           
     
      for (i in 1:layer) {
    layer_nonlinear <- layer_nonlinear %>% 
      layer_dense(units = ceiling(units_choice * 1/2),
                  activation = 'tanh',
                  kernel_initializer = initializer_glorot_uniform(seed = 145)) %>% 
      layer_dropout(rate = 0.1) %>% layer_lambda(row_scale)
  }

      concat <- layer_concatenate(list(layer_linear, layer_nonlinear))
      layer_3 <- concat %>%
                    layer_dense(units = units_choice * 1/3, 
                                activation = 'swish', 
                                kernel_initializer = initializer_glorot_uniform(seed=145)) %>% layer_lambda(row_scale)

# Define the rest of the model
        output <- layer_3 %>%
                 layer_dense(units = length(stock_ids_short), 
                             activation = "linear",
                             kernel_initializer = "glorot_uniform")  %>%  layer_lambda(row_scale)%>%
          layer_lambda(w_full_constraint) # full investment constrain

          model <- keras_model(inputs = list(layer_1, layer_2), outputs = output)

# Compile the model
           model %>% compile(
               loss = sharpe_ratio_loss,
               optimizer = optimizer_adam(learning_rate = 0.1)
                             )
  return(model)
 
}


tuner <- kerastuneR::RandomSearch(
    build_hp_tuning_model,
    objective = 'val_loss',
    max_trials = 100,
    executions_per_trial = 1,
    directory = '~/R/ML_SR',
    project_name = 'B_opt_deep_portfolio')

tuner %>% fit_tuner(list(window_data, window_data),window_returns, batch_size =12,
                    epochs = 30, 
                    validation_data = list(list(val_window_data, val_window_data),val_returns),  shuffle=FALSE)
```

```{r}
best_5_models  <- tuner %>% get_best_models(5)
best_5_models[[1]] 
```
```{r}
tuner %>%results_summary(10)
```
